certification_of_commercial_purpose.information_requested_under_the_kentucky:
Pursuant to the Kentucky Open Records Act, I am requesting access to and copies of the following records maintained by Louisville Metro Government and any of its applicable departments, including but not limited to Louisville Metro Planning & Design Services, Louisville Metro Economic Development, and Louisville Metro Public Works:

1. A complete, up-to-date list (in electronic format, preferably CSV or Excel) of all active commercial building permits issued within Jefferson County, Kentucky, for the period from 2023-01-01 through 2025-11-30. For each permit, I request the following data fields, to the extent they are maintained in the ordinary course of business:
   - Permit number
   - Permit type and sub-type (e.g., new construction, renovation, tenant finish, change of use)
   - Project address (including street number, street name, suite/unit number, city, state, ZIP code)
   - Parcel ID or map/lot number
   - Project description or scope of work (as entered by the applicant or plan reviewer)
   - Name of property owner
   - Name, mailing address, phone number, and email address of the applicant/permit holder
   - Name, mailing address, phone number, and email address of the general contractor (if different from applicant)
   - Issue date of the permit
   - Status of the permit (e.g., issued, active, finaled, expired, revoked)
   - Valuation or estimated project cost

2. A list of all planning and zoning approvals (including conditional use permits, variances, and development plan approvals) for non-residential or mixed-use projects within Jefferson County, Kentucky, for the period from 2023-01-01 through 2025-11-30. For each approval, please include:
   - Case number
   - Project name (if applicable)
   - Project address and parcel ID
   - Type of approval granted
   - Date of approval
   - Name and contact information (mailing address, phone, and email) for the property owner and applicant/developer of record.

3. Any available summary reports, in electronic format, that aggregate or summarize commercial building activity or non-residential development (for example, quarterly or annual commercial permit activity reports) for calendar years 2023, 2024, and year-to-date 2025.

If any of these records are already compiled in a regularly produced electronic report or exportable database, I am willing to accept such format in lieu of individually compiled records, as long as the requested data fields are included. I prefer to receive these records electronically via email or secure download link to reduce copying costs and facilitate data analysis.
certification_of_commercial_purpose.commercial_purpose_for_which_the_informa:
The requested information will be used for a commercial purpose as defined in K.R.S. 61.870(4)(a). Specifically, I am a research analyst with a private real estate data and analytics firm that compiles, organizes, and analyzes public records related to commercial development, construction activity, and real estate investment trends. Our firm integrates permit and planning data from various jurisdictions, including Louisville Metro Government, into a proprietary database that is then used to produce subscription-based market intelligence products, custom analytics reports, and interactive mapping tools sold to paying clients.

The data from this request will be:
1. Standardized and merged with other public datasets (such as property tax assessment records and demographic data) to provide our clients with detailed insight into current and planned commercial development within Jefferson County.
2. Used to identify patterns in construction and redevelopment activity, such as which corridors are seeing increased investment, which types of commercial uses (e.g., industrial warehouses, retail centers, office renovations, hospitality projects) are most active, and how permit activity correlates with broader economic trends.
3. Incorporated into regular market reports and dashboards that our clients—primarily commercial brokers, developers, institutional investors, and construction firms—access through a paid subscription platform.
4. Used to generate targeted lead lists and opportunity maps that highlight property owners and developers who are currently active in the market, which our clients may use to solicit business opportunities such as brokerage representation, construction services, or financing.

While the analysis and derivative products we create will be sold for profit and used in the course of for-profit business development and investment decision-making, the raw public records will not be resold in their original, unaltered format. They will be incorporated into value-added analytical tools, reports, and visualizations that combine multiple data sources and our firm’s proprietary methodologies.
certification_of_commercial_purpose.entity_benefiting_from_the_commercial_pu:
Bluegrass Real Estate Analytics, LLC – a privately held real estate data, research, and consulting firm headquartered in Louisville, Kentucky. Bluegrass Real Estate Analytics, LLC specializes in aggregating public records related to property ownership, zoning, permitting, and construction across Kentucky and neighboring states. The company’s primary lines of business include:

- Subscription-based online dashboards providing interactive maps and time-series charts of commercial development activity.
- Custom market studies and site selection analyses for regional and national commercial developers.
- Quarterly and annual market reports on industrial, office, retail, and mixed-use development trends sold to brokers, lenders, and institutional investors.
- Data licensing and API access to select, value-added datasets derived from public records.

The requested Louisville Metro open records will be incorporated into Bluegrass Real Estate Analytics, LLC’s internal database and will directly support its commercial products and consulting engagements. The firm expects to use this information to enhance its Louisville/Jefferson County market coverage, which is a key part of its business development strategy for 2025–2027.
certification_of_commercial_purpose.title: Senior Research Analyst

notary_acknowledgment.notary_public_state_at_large_signature: Sarah L. Whitaker, Notary Public, State at Large, Kentucky
